evidence_direction_note: Substrate failure: experiment script does not call agent.update_residue() in its training/eval loops, so the running-variance / commit-gate subsystem is dormant (_running_variance pinned at 0.5, gate never fires). BG never commits -> agent never approaches resources during eval -> z_goal seeding never triggers (z_goal_active_fraction=0.0 all seeds) -> goal-lift comparison degenerates to 0/0. C1 benefit_eval_r2=0.22 is close to the 0.30 floor but cannot be cleanly attributed to SD-018 alone. Pipeline downstream of SD-018 (z_goal seeding, MECH-112, MECH-295, ARC-030) was not actually exercised. Reclassified non_contributory for all 5 claim_ids. Same root cause cluster as EXQ-514d/514e/530.
